category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to EU) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-EU Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against EU requirements: Battery Regulation 2023/1542, EN IEC 62133-2 cell safety, EMC/CE marking, UN 38.3 transport, EU Authorised Representative, EPR registration, and WEEE obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与欧盟要求对照：电池法规2023/1542、EN IEC 62133-2电芯安全、EMC/CE标志、UN 38.3运输、欧盟授权代表、EPR注册及WEEE义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與歐盟要求對照：電池法規2023/1542、EN IEC 62133-2電芯安全、EMC/CE標誌、UN 38.3運輸、歐盟授權代表、EPR登記及WEEE義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters must obtain EN IEC 62133-2 testing, CE marking under LVD and Battery Regulation 2023/1542, an EU Authorised Representative, and EPR registration per Member State — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商须取得EN IEC 62133-2检测报告、依据LVD及电池法规2023/1542的CE标志、欧盟授权代表资质，并在每个欧盟成员国完成EPR注册——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商須取得EN IEC 62133-2檢測報告、依據LVD及電池法規2023/1542的CE標誌、歐盟授權代表資質，並在每個歐盟成員國完成EPR登記——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from eur-lex.europa.eu, europa.eu, iec.ch, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does Chinese GB 31241 safety certification satisfy EU requirements for portable lithium batteries?
q.zh: 中国GB 31241安全认证是否满足欧盟便携式锂电池要求？
q.zht: 中國GB 31241安全認證是否滿足歐盟便攜式鋰電池要求？

a.en: No. GB 31241 is a Chinese national standard. EU market placement requires EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 testing from an EU-recognised laboratory, and CE marking under the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU and Battery Regulation 2023/1542. Verify specific requirements with a qualified EU compliance advisor before export.
a.zh: 否。GB 31241为中国国家标准。进入欧盟市场须由欧盟认可实验室完成EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021检测，并取得低压指令2014/35/EU及电池法规2023/1542下的CE标志。出口前请向具备资质的欧盟合规顾问核实具体要求。
a.zht: 否。GB 31241為中國國家標準。進入歐盟市場須由歐盟認可實驗室完成EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021檢測，並取得低壓指令2014/35/EU及電池法規2023/1542下的CE標誌。出口前請向具備資質的歐盟合規顧問核實具體要求。

q.en: Is a UN 38.3 test report required to ship lithium batteries to the EU?
q.zh: 向欧盟运输锂电池是否需要UN 38.3测试报告？
q.zht: 向歐盟運輸鋰電池是否需要UN 38.3測試報告？

a.en: Yes. UN 38.3 testing is a universal transport requirement for all lithium batteries shipped by air, sea, or road — regardless of destination. For road transport within the EU, ADR Class 9 documentation (UN 3480 / UN 3481) is additionally required. Verify current IATA DGR and ADR editions with your logistics provider.
a.zh: 是。UN 38.3测试为所有锂电池空运、海运或陆运的全球性运输要求，不受目的地影响。在欧盟境内道路运输时，还须额外提供ADR第9类文件（UN 3480/UN 3481）。请向您的物流服务商核实最新版IATA DGR及ADR要求。
a.zht: 是。UN 38.3測試為所有鋰電池空運、海運或陸運的全球性運輸要求，不受目的地影響。在歐盟境內道路運輸時，還須額外提供ADR第9類文件（UN 3480/UN 3481）。請向您的物流服務商核實最新版IATA DGR及ADR要求。
